notes: Full skill editor with file explorer, frontmatter editor, text editor, markdown preview, and syntax highlighting
Draft system for creating and editing skills before saving to disk
Visual editors for skill variable state with preview panel
Session workspace with canvas, todo, diff viewer, and artifact viewer
Annotation overlay with markers, cards, input, and list views on session artifacts
Git tab showing status, diff, and log for the active workspace
Chat drafting interface for session communication
Terminal tab for workspace PTY access
MCP bridge connecting Studio to the local ship daemon for real-time state
Real-time event stream panel with debug view using SSE from shipd
Publish skills and agents to the Ship registry from Studio
Push compiled config to GitHub from Studio
Real-time sync status indicator between Studio and local CLI
Visual editor for agent permission presets
Download compiled provider output from Studio
Real-time daemon event listener for workspace and session updates
